# Radiant Control Systems LLC

> Empowering Industry with Intelligent Control. Radiant Control Systems is an industrial automation and controls system integrator based in Duluth, GA, serving Georgia, the Southeast, and nationwide.

## What we do
Radiant Control Systems designs and integrates industrial control systems for municipal water, wastewater, power, oil & gas, food & beverage, aggregate, automotive, and manufacturing facilities. Core services:
- **Control Panels**: A control panel is an engineered enclosure that houses the electrical components — PLCs, drives, starters, and protection — that run a machine or process. Radiant designs and builds them to UL-508A and NEC standards.
- **PLC System Integration**: PLC system integration is the seamless incorporation of Programmable Logic Controllers into industrial processes to deliver reliable automation and control — from initial design through programming and commissioning.
- **HMI/SCADA Integration**: HMI/SCADA integration connects operators to their process through real-time monitoring, control, and data visualization — the interface layer that sits on top of PLCs and field devices.
- **Field Service**: Field service covers the on-site work that keeps automation systems running: commissioning new installations, troubleshooting faults, training operators, and rolling out PLC/SCADA updates.

## Industries served
- Wastewater
- Aggregate
- Automobiles
- Logistics
- Food & Beverage
- Power Plant
- Oil & Gas
- Manufacturing

## Platforms & technologies
- PLC: ControlLogix, CompactLogix, MicroLogix, SLC 500, PLC5; Siemens — S5, S7, TIA Portal; Schneider / Modicon; GE Intelligent Platforms; Automation Direct; Mitsubishi
- HMI/SCADA: Wonderware InTouch, iFIX, FactoryTalk View SE/ME, EZ Automation, Ignition, Optix
- Networks: Ethernet TCP/IP, ControlNet, RS232, DeviceNet, Profibus network, Profinet
- Motion control: VFDs, Encoders, Servo Drives and Resolvers
- Also: Allen-Bradley, ControlLogix, Siemens S7, TIA Portal, Modicon, Wonderware, FactoryTalk View, Ignition, GE iFIX, VTScada, Profibus, EtherNet/IP, UL-508A, VFD Drives, MCC Design

## Expertise
- Industrial automation
- UL-508A control panel design
- PLC programming and integration
- HMI and SCADA integration
- Allen-Bradley ControlLogix
- Siemens S7 / TIA Portal
- Wonderware InTouch
- FactoryTalk View
- Ignition SCADA
- Lift station and pump control
- Wastewater treatment automation
- Motor control centers (MCC)
- Variable frequency drives (VFD)
- Field service and commissioning

## Certifications & registrations
DBE & MBE certified. GDOT Vendor ID 19325. NAICS 541511, 541512, 541330. GMDC AT249607. NIGP 69031, 69032, 03125, 92040. CAGE 10NB0. UEI S5L4B99AGYX3.

## Leadership
Founded 2018 by Ami Patwa. CEO: Tejas "TJ" Patwa — 22+ years in control engineering and project management, Honorary Doctorate in Management (2022).
